content: HomeDirectoryGreater ManchesterListings are provided for professional reference only. PoliceStationRepUK.com does not verify availability, does not arrange attendance, and does not recommend or endorse any individual listed.Greater ManchesterPolice Station Representatives in Greater ManchesterFind accredited police station representatives covering all Greater Manchester Police custody suites. Available 24/7 for immediate attendance at Manchester, Salford, Bolton, Stockport and across Greater Manchester.Search Greater Manchester RepsRegister as Manchester Rep4+Registered Greater Manchester Representatives32+Greater Manchester Police Stations24/7Coverage AvailablePolice Station Representation in Greater ManchesterGreater Manchester is one of England's largest metropolitan areas, with Greater Manchester Police being the third-largest police force in England. GMP operates multiple custody suites across Manchester, Salford, Bolton, Stockport, Oldham, Rochdale, Wigan, Bury and Tameside.All representatives listed state they hold current PSRAS accreditation through the Law Society.
